name: Frey Table Lamp - 15 Inch Height - TBL4533 - Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Frey 15 inch brass metal table lamp. Designed with elegance, its brass finish adds a touch of sophistication to any room. The sturdy metal base ensures stability while the sleek form enhances modern decor with ease. Perfect for desks, bedside tables, or living room accents, this lamp provides a warm glow that complements any setting. Its compact size makes it a versatile choice for various surfaces without overwhelming the space. Bring style and function together effortlessly with the Frey table lamp. An ideal addition to elevate your home lighting experience.
